name: Suppliers tab is hidden for a non-Purchaseable part
steps:
Given a part 'In-House PCB' is not marked as 'Purchaseable'
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'In-House PCB'
Then the 'Suppliers' tab is not visible in the tab bar

name: Suppliers tab is visible only for Purchaseable parts
steps:
Given a part 'Resistor 10k' is marked as 'Purchaseable' and has one linked supplier part
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Resistor 10k'
Then the 'Suppliers' tab is visible and displays the linked supplier part
